signals.headline: Trump Seeks Lower Interest Rates Despite Inflation Concerns | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Seeks Lower Interest Rates Despite Inflation Concerns | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump told the Wall Street Journal he wants the Fed to cut rates to 1% or lower by the end of 2026, while the current Fed rate stands at 3.5-3.7%.[3] This creates tension with current inflation concerns and Warsh's stated inflation-fighting priorities during his confirmation hearing.[3]
